channel.title: DevLog | Adam Świderski | software engineer blog
channel.description: Software engineering and architecture | Android | Kotlin | Programming

item.title: Shell script basics
item.description: If you are lazy and you know it clap your han... write shell scripts

item.title: Overlibrarization
item.description: Sharing code between projects with your own libraries is generaly a good thing, but it comes with a cost. I'd like to share some of my experience about it.

item.title: Android build hacks #3 - documentation with Dokka
item.description: Generating documentation with Dokka and publishing it on GitHub walkthrough

item.title: Android Build Hacks #2 - build time optimization
item.description: Android tricks to speed up builds, fix Gradle tasks, use Gradle profiling tools etc..

item.title: Android Build Hacks #1 - build basics
item.description: Android build file tricks and hacks I've found at blogposts, YT videos etc.

item.title: Hacking Android app with Frida
item.description: Quick walkthrough of using Frida to hack Android app behaviour

item.title: Nyan your terminal
item.description: Some tools I use with my terminal to make my work more efficient.

item.title: Android local libraries with Maven
item.description: Local Maven repository guide for working on private libraries along with projects that use them

item.title: Color changing progress bar
item.description: Simple guide to color changing progress bar
